overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a snowy mountainous landscape during golden hour. The character traverses a wooden bridge, passes the tribal settlement 'Stone's Echo' built into a rock face, and continues through open terrain with atmospheric mist and warm backlighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail through pine forest

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the winding snowy mountain path surrounded by pine trees

entered.detail: snowy mountain slope with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation
dense forest of snow-dusted pine trees covering the mountainside
rocky mountain ridge line against the cloudy sky
low shrubs and bushes covered in snow lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a winding snowy trail through a mountainous landscape. Snow-covered pine trees line the path while rocky outcrops rise on either side, all bathed in warm golden hour light filtering through the clouds.

events.description: character steps onto a rustic wooden bridge crossing a rocky gap

agents.ego_description: carefully running across the wooden bridge with log railings

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge made of logs and planks spanning a gorge
rough-hewn log railings along the left side of the bridge
steep rocky cliff face visible below and beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a narrow wooden bridge with log railings spanning a rocky gorge. The bridge provides a vantage point over the misty valley below while leading toward a distant settlement visible on the mountainside ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement built into rock outcrop

events.description: approaching Stone's Echo settlement built into the rock face
location name 'Stone's Echo' appears as text overlay on screen

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the tribal settlement, observing the wooden structures built into the rock

notable_agents.action: tribal members standing on wooden platforms of the settlement

entered.detail: tribal settlement built into a large rock outcrop with wooden platforms and scaffolding
wooden platforms and structures built against the rock face
large rock face decorated with colorful tribal banners and patterns
rustic wooden scaffolding and walkways connecting the settlement levels

segments.scene_description: The character approaches Stone's Echo, a tribal settlement built into a massive rock outcrop featuring wooden platforms, scaffolding, and colorful banners. NPCs can be seen standing on the elevated structures as the character runs up stone steps and circles the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow with scattered boulders

events.description: leaving the settlement behind and entering open terrain with large boulders
approaching a wooden barricade and fallen log structure

agents.ego_description: traversing the open snowy meadow toward a distant wooden barricade

entered.detail: tall pine tree leaning against a large boulder
massive gray boulder with a tree growing against it
rustic wooden barrier made of logs blocking the path ahead
fallen logs and wooden debris creating a natural barrier

segments.scene_description: The character runs through an open mountain meadow featuring a distinctive large pine tree growing against a massive boulder. The terrain transitions to a path blocked by wooden barricades and fallen logs as the warm golden light fades into misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain wilderness that transitions from a wild trail into a tribal settlement and back into the open highlands. It begins with the character running along a winding snowy path lined with pine trees and rocky outcrops under a warm golden hour glow. As the trail leads forward, the camera follows the character across a narrow wooden bridge spanning a misty gorge, providing a clear view of a distant settlement perched on the mountainside. The scene then opens up as the character enters Stone's Echo, navigating stone steps and circling wooden platforms and colorful banners built into a massive rock outcrop. Finally, the movement shifts away from the settlement and into an open mountain meadow, passing a large pine tree against a boulder before the path is obstructed by wooden barricades as the golden light fades into a misty distance.
